news.t: Free Cash Flow and Fixed Income Strategies Gaining Attention in Today's Market
Faith Meets Fundamentals: Timothy Plan Launches 3 New ETFs
Timothy Plan Launches Three ETFs Focused on Free Cash Flow and Fixed Income

overview.description: The Timothy Plan Fixed Income ETF (TPFI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund actively manages a broad portfolio of debt securities with various maturities and credit ratings from around the world. The fund principles-based screen to exclude issuers not meeting Christian values. TPFI was launched on May 5, 2026 and is issued by Timothy Plan.
